tasks.completion_summary: JobObjectWatchdog + stdin-EOF + -c ExpandAliases parity. Also closed dSIX4qP7DtFG and j19Y46rA74c2. Commit ab1f75e.
ProcessRunHelper extracted; all E2E spawns now use 30s timeout + Kill(entireProcessTree:true) in finally. Added HangingCommand tests in both E2E files — verified pass in 12s, no leaked workers.

Runspace parent-watcher injected BEFORE module bootstrap in both worker paths (scripts/ps-bash-worker.ps1 top + PwshWorker.BuildInitScript top). Defense-in-depth for when Job Object attach fails or on non-Windows. Regression test WorkerExits_WhenParentDiesDuringBootstrap passes. All ProcessLifecycle (4) + HangingCommand (2) tests green.

Bug not reproducible on current HEAD — `ps-bash -c 'echo x; pwd; ls *.md | head -3'` produces 4 distinct lines (bytes: 62-61-...-0D-0A repeated). Original repro `ab` was the Bash/display tool concatenating multi-line stdout, not a real ps-bash defect. Added two regression tests (Command_ChainedCommands_EachOutputsOwnLine, Command_EchoPwdLsPipeHead_OutputsDistinctLines) to lock in correct behavior. Both pass. All 6 ProcessLifecycle/HangingCommand tests still green.

Verified already-resolved in v0.8.8. OnCancelKeyPress (InteractiveShell.cs:1190) sets e.Cancel=true and cancels only the current command CTS; main loop catches OperationCanceledException, disposes dead worker, starts fresh worker, continues prompting. `exit`/`logout` remain clean shutdown path via IsExitCommand. _suspendCancel gate lets child processes (TryRunDirect) handle Ctrl+C themselves. No code changes; xUnit regression for console control signals is infeasible and behavior is covered indirectly by existing ProcessLifecycle tests.

Verified already-fixed in commit 6b13eb4 / v0.8.8. src/PsBash.Shell/InteractiveShell.cs has GetConsoleMode/SetConsoleMode P/Invokes (1134-1141), ENABLE_VIRTUAL_TERMINAL_PROCESSING=0x0004 constant (1145), EnsureVirtualTerminalEnabled() (1151-1161), EnsureConsoleInputRestored() (1174-1188), and TryRunDirect invokes both immediately after proc.WaitForExit() (249-252) so VT mode is restored after every foreground child (git, node, python). Matches the task's proposed P/Invoke exactly. No code changes needed.
